name: Aurora Borealis Synthesis
description: Render a 3D volume of swirling aurora light and project it onto the 2D video surface, with audio-driven motion and depth-based mapping.

params.name: Intensity
params.description: Controls the overall strength of the generated effect.

params.name: Speed
params.description: Controls animation and temporal evolution speed.

params.name: Scale
params.description: Controls spatial scale, frequency, or detail contrast.

params.name: Mouse Influence
params.description: Controls mouse-driven or secondary variation influence.
